heading: Omitted
label: 670 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which authorized encumbrance by mortgage or deed of trust of lands sold pursuant to and directed that the United States be a party to any foreclosure or sale proceedings, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–312, § 386 Stat. 216section 668 of this titleJune 14, 1972
